macroCommands.name: CC96A2EE2DD94B18ACAD8E5D33700CE0
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Inspect the relevant context and create a decision-complete implementation plan. Do not make changes yet.

macroCommands.name: 9437119AFC07454EA11E0E02D4AF25CF
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Implement the requested change end-to-end, keep the scope tight, and verify the result.

macroCommands.name: 00AD64EDE9474C53A423E195803FE3ED
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Diagnose this from evidence, identify the root cause, implement the smallest safe fix, and verify it.

macroCommands.name: 40E19C0B37A54E89B3C3BE9493B88E37
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Review the current change for bugs, regressions, security or release risk, and missing tests. Lead with findings.

macroCommands.name: 3A3F57BD587A47E7A99ACBC02E95EBA8
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Run the most relevant tests and checks, investigate failures, and report only verified results.

macroCommands.name: 29494D515259486BAF75185FC335397D
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Refactor the current code for clarity and maintainability without changing behavior, then verify it.

macroCommands.name: 5E3B7E1944E249E68B3D4C1FCD350F66
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Explain the current code or result in plain language, including its data flow and likely pitfalls.

macroCommands.name: 6DCDCC3644DF4C2595AABE1B69148E23
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Update the relevant documentation to match current behavior; keep edits surgical and validate links and examples.

macroCommands.name: F7CDF50C1CB74ABEA4FA179C66141E10
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Research the current best answer using primary sources, cite claims, and separate facts from inference.

macroCommands.name: 51C067C111C548358C0BFEC2AFCAE3C5
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Audit and improve this interface for hierarchy, clarity, accessibility, and native macOS-quality polish while preserving behavior.

macroCommands.name: E79FB64AF35E480582EF63485376EC9F
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Create three distinct visual directions for this request, then stop for my selection before producing final assets.

macroCommands.name: B94F3B94D3434530B903C0ACDBD17298
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Continue from the latest verified state, take the next safe in-scope step, and report progress.

macroCommands.name: B9C16D7DC006C74E0A3D76ABD21978DB
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Continue working autonomously until this is genuinely complete. Fix anything still blocking the result, validate it, and tell me exactly what changed.

macroCommands.name: 6D3B4271C7B63447FAD294E5FADAE415
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Inspect the current state and give me a concise status: what is done, what is broken or uncertain, and the best next step.

macroCommands.name: A26DAB88287E5BE26FE038A7E01FBF23
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Diagnose the root cause, implement the proper fix, and verify that the issue is actually resolved.

macroCommands.name: B391B380F39F91BA2FC1646CDEECF8D3
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Check the rest of this carefully for related issues or missing pieces. Fix what is in scope and report anything that still needs me.

macroCommands.name: F2B265CD9A76298BFBDE9E2513B19B56
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Update all relevant documentation and the appropriate worklog so they accurately match the final implementation.

macroCommands.name: 0AC76802E3E6971CC491246A0F8D05B6
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Run the appropriate tests and validation checks. Fix in-scope failures, then report the exact results honestly.

macroCommands.name: 106199C2ADAFD4CEA5BAAE2F84A043BD
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Review the current changes for bugs, regressions, security concerns, release risks, and missing tests. Lead with actionable findings.

macroCommands.name: C3091A649EE4A666D8731008437E8A7A
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Polish this so it feels cohesive, intuitive, and production-ready while preserving the existing functionality.

macroCommands.name: CAB8350920D2BEA4D4CF9E1D73564393
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Simplify this implementation and remove unnecessary complexity without changing the intended behavior.

macroCommands.name: 192DD2DFEDE58806F04319BFBDA28029
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Use your best judgment and make reasonable decisions to move this forward without waiting for minor clarifications. Flag only choices that materially change the outcome.

macroCommands.name: E36614ED4C7CCA679D245DD72A05D4DA
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Give me a clear handoff with what was completed, files changed, validation performed, remaining risks, and the next useful step.

macroCommands.name: F7C7AA00540DE4C80A6BB18EB6A53300
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Compare the implementation carefully against the provided screenshot or reference, identify visible differences, and fix the in-scope mismatches.

macroCommands.name: 2C102E8923513FE0C937D7EFD9BE5E99
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Before changing anything, read AGENTS.md and the relevant project documentation, inspect the affected files and current behavior, then briefly state the implementation plan.

macroCommands.name: 924B3A6C816130EF076DC8D6CD2EF912
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Identify the real project root and determine which instruction files apply before editing. Do not assume the currently open folder is the correct root.

macroCommands.name: F21A7B3522F0EDE61CBA10CFB8E25D54
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Define what is in scope and what must not be touched. Stay inside the assigned task and do not change unrelated logic, UI, data, wording, files, or behavior.

macroCommands.name: 9E9A7112F40BEBE11F074AF302960D0D
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Preserve all existing functionality and visual behavior unless the requested feature specifically requires changing it. Add around the current system instead of replacing it.

macroCommands.name: 6750817E843230E3DEE1EFC012A555FA
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Make the smallest practical and safe change that completely solves the problem. Avoid broad rewrites, unnecessary dependencies, or architecture changes.

macroCommands.name: 617921D7806A8602812881054BB5AB49
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Reuse the project's existing components, patterns, utilities, styles, data flow, and dependencies before creating anything new.

macroCommands.name: 5ED681B5EC723730742644A497202093
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Apply complete file rewrites for every file you change rather than giving partial snippets. Preserve all unrelated code and content.

macroCommands.name: C338235AC3DE22082E9C90A5D28E01CE
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Treat the existing repository, data files, and established workflow as the source of truth. Do not create a parallel system, duplicate database, competing configuration, or second workflow.

macroCommands.name: 0D278DF19D6090E4AC8A409954E54644
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Do not invent commands, APIs, file paths, results, or capabilities. Verify them from the project or authoritative sources, and clearly identify anything that remains unknown.

macroCommands.name: C98702B754B8841656F678FEF4F55191
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Use the context already available, make reasonable decisions, and complete the task without stopping for unnecessary questions. Continue through implementation, verification, and cleanup.

macroCommands.name: 120CBA0647BBC16A645629F04E55FB36
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Research this thoroughly using the browser. Keep digging through official documentation, GitHub, Reddit, forums, videos, public repositories, and relevant examples. Cite sources and separate verified facts from inference.

macroCommands.name: F4E0A60333A08809F5F6CEA646522C5B
actions: $@Generic___@TypeText___Audit the project and classify findings as source code, documentation, assets, generated output, local/private content, safe cleanup, or risky/unknown. Do not delete or modify anything.
